/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/hgraph_ts_schema_tests.dir/test_delta_view.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hgraph_ts_schema_tests.dir/test_ts_schema_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hgraph_ts_schema_tests.dir/ts_test_stubs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hgraph_ts_schema_tests.dir/Users/hhenson/CLionProjects/hgraph/cpp/src/cpp/types/value/type_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hgraph_ts_schema_tests.dir/Users/hhenson/CLionProjects/hgraph/cpp/src/cpp/types/time_series/ts_meta_schema_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hgraph_ts_schema_tests.dir/Users/hhenson/CLionProjects/hgraph/cpp/src/cpp/types/time_series/ts_type_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hgraph_ts_schema_tests.dir/Users/hhenson/CLionProjects/hgraph/cpp/src/cpp/types/time_series/link_target.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hgraph_ts_schema_tests.dir/Users/hhenson/CLionProjects/hgraph/cpp/src/cpp/types/time_series/ref_link.cpp.o -o hgraph_ts_schema_tests  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libfmt.12.1.0.dylib /Users/hhenson/.local/share/uv/python/cpython-3.12.8-macos-aarch64-none/lib/libpython3.12.dylib libhgraph_nanobind-static.a _deps/nanoarrow-build/libnanoarrow_static.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
